name: select-scrollable
visual_summary: The select-scrollable component is a customizable dropdown list that allows users to select from a large number of items, often used in applications requiring a long list of options. It typically features a list of scrollable options with a clear label and a selection trigger button. Developers would use this component when they need to provide users with a vast number of choices.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: select-scrollable
Description: The select-scrollable component is a customizable dropdown list that allows users to select from a large number of items, often used in applications requiring a long list of options. It typically features a list of scrollable options with a clear label and a selection trigger button. Developers would use this component when they need to provide users with a vast number of choices.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. animated, hover, clickable
Tags: dropdown, scrollable, select, list, options

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
